/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -g  -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../libplugin-monitor.dylib -install_name @rpath/libplugin-monitor.dylib "CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/monitor.c.o" "CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/monitor_config.c.o" "CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/mqtt_handle.c.o"   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./ -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/dannv/Workspace/SYSTEMS/emqx:clone/emqx-neuron/build-check-cm4 ../../libneuron-base.dylib -lnng /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.a -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lm -lprotobuf-c /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libxml2.tbd -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
